key_points: A ratio compares two quantities using division
Ratios can be written in the form a:b
Equivalent ratios represent the same relationship between quantities
A proportion states that two ratios are equal
Proportional quantities increase or decrease in the same ratio
examples: Real life example: ratio of boys to girls in a class
formulas: Equivalent ratios → multiply or divide both terms by the same number
Proportion rule → a:b = c:d if a × d = b × c
exam_tips: Always simplify ratios to their simplest form
Write ratios in the same units before comparing
Practice identifying ratios in real-life situations
